description: We are hiring for a 'Lead Social Worker'. Three candidates (Elena Rodriguez, Marcus Chen, and Sarah Washington) have submitted resumes located in ~/Desktop/New_Applicants. Add these candidates to Sentrifugo under the 'Lead Social Worker' job title and upload their respective resumes to their profiles. Per state compliance laws, only candidates who hold an Active Licensed Clinical Social Worker (LCSW) credential may be interviewed. Identify the qualified candidate(s) and schedule a 'First Round' interview for next Thursday at 10:00 AM with an available Hiring Manager.
